name: codeslave
description: Standalone TUI manager for batching template-driven Codex workers.

interface.shortDescription: Run and manage multiple Codex workers from a local template.
interface.longDescription: CodeSlave is a standalone desktop TUI that copies an internal project template, rewrites Task with the target repository URL, and manages concurrent codex exec workers with flow switching, logs, and retries.
defaultPrompt: Queue several GitHub repositories from the built-in DemoProject template.
Switch flow definitions and monitor worker progress.
